General.Name: Beijing UBOX Online Tech Corp
General.Description: Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. operates vending machines in Mainland China. It operates through Unmanned Retail Business; Merchandise Wholesale; Advertising and System Support Services; and Others segments. The company sells fast-moving consumer goods, such as food and beverage to end customers through a network of vending machines, including pick-and-go cabinet, beverage vending machine, beverage and snack vending machine, and freshly brewed beverage vending machines. It is also involved in merchandise wholesale; vending machine sales and leases; and provision of merchandise display advertising and mobile device distribution services. In addition, the company engages in the sell, lease, and/or provide hardware support services comprising machine installation and maintenance services for vending machines; operation system support to karaoke booth franchisees; and operates karaoke booths. Beijing UBOX Online Technology Corp. was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
General.Address: Tagen Knowledge & Innovation Center, Tower A, Shenzhen, China
